# Metronome

## Tags
metronome, tempo, rhythm, beat, bpm, music, audio, sound, practice, timing, timer, time, pulse, sync, cadence, control, playback, studio, tool

## Categories
multimedia, time

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/metronome)

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::Metronome;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        Metronome { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```
